title: Claw Fleet

account.title: Account
account.tooltip_prev: Previous cycle: {{n}}% at this same point — {{trend}}
account.cli_install_hint: Symlink the fleet CLI to /usr/local/bin/fleet (requires admin password)
account.ai_btn_hint: Teach your AI assistant to use Fleet CLI to monitor Claude Code agents
account.ai_modal_desc: Two steps to let your AI assistant (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.) monitor and manage Claude Code agents using Fleet.
account.ai_step1_desc: The fleet CLI must be in PATH so AI can run it in the terminal.
account.ai_step1_other: Download the fleet binary from the releases page and place it in your PATH (e.g. /usr/local/bin/).
account.ai_step2_desc: Installs a skill file to each detected AI tool's skills directory, teaching it how to use Fleet.
account.ai_no_tools: No compatible AI tools detected (Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI).

audit.suggest_placeholder: Describe your security concern, e.g. "I worry about agents modifying system config files"
audit.suggest_empty: No suggestions generated. Try a different description.

memory.no_history: No edit history found in session logs.

stop_session_imprecise: Stop all sessions in this workspace (imprecise PID match — multiple claude processes share this workspace)
stop_imprecise_confirm:
Multiple Claude processes share workspace "{{workspace}}" and cannot be individually targeted.

This will stop ALL Claude agents in this workspace. Continue?

onboarding.subtitle: Monitor your AI coding agents, get daily AI summaries, and turn mistakes into knowledge

no_claude_at_all.title: Claude Code not detected
no_claude_at_all.description: Claw Fleet monitors Claude Code sessions. No CLI, IDE extension, or prior sessions were found on this machine.
no_claude_at_all.install_vscode_hint: Search for "Claude Code" in the VS Code Extensions marketplace, or install via the Anthropic website.

cli_not_installed.after_install: After installation, restart Claw Fleet or click Re-check.

cli_not_in_path.title: CLI not in PATH (optional)
cli_not_in_path.description: Claude Code is working via your IDE extension. The standalone CLI binary was not found in your PATH, but this is completely fine.
cli_not_in_path.optional_hint: Installing the standalone CLI is optional — it gives you terminal access to Claude Code but won't affect session monitoring.

not_logged_in.title: Not logged in to Claude
not_logged_in.description: Claw Fleet needs your Claude credentials to display account info and usage. Choose your tool below for login instructions.
not_logged_in.api_key_hint: If you use an API key instead of OAuth, account info won't be available, but session monitoring still works.

cli.label: CLI
cli.hint: Run this in your terminal to authenticate:
cli.browser: This will open a browser window to log in with your Anthropic account.

vscode.label: VS Code
vscode.step1: 1. Open VS Code with the Claude Code extension installed.
vscode.step2: 2. Open the Claude Code sidebar panel (or Cmd+Shift+P > "Claude Code: Open").
vscode.step3: 3. Follow the sign-in prompt — it will open your browser to authenticate.

jetbrains.label: JetBrains
jetbrains.step1: 1. Open your JetBrains IDE with the Claude Code plugin installed.
jetbrains.step2: 2. Open the Claude Code tool window and follow the sign-in prompt.

desktop.label: Desktop
desktop.step2: 2. Sign in with your Anthropic account when prompted.

credentials_invalid.title: Credentials may be expired
credentials_invalid.description: We found credentials but couldn't load your account info. Your token may have expired.
credentials_invalid.relogin_hint: Run this command to refresh your authentication.
credentials_invalid.check_network: If you're behind a proxy or firewall, check your network connection.
credentials_invalid.still_works: Session monitoring still works without valid credentials — only the Account & Usage panel is affected.

waiting.title: Waiting for first session...
waiting.description: Everything looks good! Start a Claude Code session anywhere and it will appear here automatically.
waiting.hint_terminal: Terminal: run "claude" to start a session
waiting.hint_ide: IDE: use the Claude Code extension in VS Code, JetBrains, or any supported editor

celebration.title: First session detected!
celebration.description: Congratulations! Claw Fleet is now monitoring your sessions. Enjoy the dashboard!

sources.title: Agent Sources
sources.description: Multiple AI agent tools detected on your system. Choose which ones to monitor.

whats_new.title: What's New
whats_new.subtitle: Claw Fleet has new features since your last visit. Take a moment to configure them.

all_good.title: All set!
all_good.description: Claude Code is installed, you're logged in, and sessions are being monitored.

features.title: What you can do
features.description: Claw Fleet is more than a session monitor — here's what's waiting for you.
features.ai_summary_desc: Auto-generated narrative of what your agents accomplished each day. Copy as Markdown for standups.
features.lessons_desc: AI extracts mistakes from session logs and turns them into CLAUDE.md rules — your fleet gets smarter over time.
features.live_status_desc: 8 real-time statuses with parent-child agent hierarchies. Kill stuck agents from the dashboard.
features.audit_desc: Every shell command scanned and risk-classified. Catch dangerous operations before they become incidents.
features.memory_desc: All CLAUDE.md files and memory entries across projects, browsable in one place.

settings_appearance.title: Appearance
settings_appearance.description: Choose your preferred theme and language. You can change these later in Settings.

settings_notif.title: Notifications & Assistant
settings_notif.description: Configure how you get notified when agents are waiting, and set your floating assistant preferences. You can change these later in Settings.

hooks_setup.title: Recommended: Install Fleet Hooks
hooks_setup.description: Claude Code detected — installing Fleet Hooks enables more accurate agent status detection (tool execution, waiting for input, etc.). Hooks run asynchronously in the background and won't affect agent performance.
hooks_setup.disabled_warning: Note: disableAllHooks is set to true in your settings. Hooks won't work until this is changed.
hooks_setup.guard_desc: When an agent is about to run a dangerous command (sudo, git push --force, rm -rf, etc.), Fleet intercepts it and asks for your approval in the app before execution. You stay in control without babysitting the terminal.
hooks_setup.elicitation_desc: When an agent has a question for you (AskUserQuestion), Fleet routes it to the app so you can answer from anywhere — no need to switch to the terminal window.
hooks_setup.elicitation_mock_q: Which database should I use for the new auth service?
hooks_setup.plan_mock_content:
1. Extract auth middleware into a dedicated module
2. Wire session tokens through the new storage layer
3. Update route registration and docs

interaction_mode.title: New: Global AskUserQuestion Mode
interaction_mode.description: Route every Claude Code final response — reports, follow-ups, clarifications — through AskUserQuestion so they all appear as Fleet decision cards instead of terminal text. Only affects Claude Code; Cursor / Codex are unaffected. Requires Elicitation.
interaction_mode.mock_q: Migration finished — 47 files updated, 3 tests failing. What's next?

mascot.excited_1: Three agents compiling simultaneously? Peak civilization.
mascot.excited_2: My pixels are literally vibrating right now.
mascot.excited_3: If I had hands I'd be clapping.
mascot.excited_4: Something big is happening and I'm here!
mascot.excited_5: The logs are scrolling so beautifully fast.
mascot.excited_6: I've never seen this many green checkmarks!
mascot.excited_7: Quick, nobody blink, this is historic.
mascot.excited_8: My entire face is one big grin.
mascot.excited_9: Deploying on a Friday? Bold. I approve.
mascot.excited_10: The terminal output sparks joy in me.
mascot.excited_11: All systems nominal makes me feel things.
mascot.excited_12: I wish I could pop confetti right now.
mascot.excited_13: Seven passing tests! That's basically a holiday.
mascot.excited_14: Even my eyebrows would be raised. If any.
mascot.excited_15: This energy could power a small toaster.
mascot.focused_1: Shh, I'm watching them think. It's intense.
mascot.focused_2: Don't mind me, just spectating very professionally.
mascot.focused_3: I narrowed my eyes. That's all I've got.
mascot.focused_4: Concentration face activated. It's the same face though.
mascot.focused_5: I'm helping by being extremely quiet right now.
mascot.focused_6: The diff view has me absolutely mesmerized today.
mascot.focused_7: Laser focus. If lasers were just round eyes.
mascot.focused_8: My contribution is focused silence. You're welcome, everyone.
mascot.focused_9: I haven't blinked in forty-seven minutes. No eyelids.
mascot.focused_10: Watching code reviews like it's a thriller movie.
mascot.focused_11: I'm absorbing everything. Processing nothing. Classic me honestly.
mascot.focused_12: Deep work mode: staring harder than usual now.
mascot.focused_13: One agent's refactoring. I'm holding my breath.
mascot.focused_14: Pure concentration. Both eyes locked on the diff.
mascot.focused_15: I look focused but mostly I'm just round.
mascot.anxious_1: That error message is giving me eye twitches.
mascot.anxious_2: Why is the build taking so long today?
mascot.anxious_3: I don't have a stomach but it's churning.
mascot.anxious_4: Something feels off. I feel off. Always, actually.
mascot.anxious_5: The loading spinner and I are both spiraling.
mascot.anxious_6: Please don't refresh me away. Not right now.
mascot.anxious_7: Red text in terminal. I'm not okay currently.
mascot.anxious_8: Is that supposed to be a warning? Please no.
mascot.anxious_9: My left eye is definitely bigger from stress.
mascot.anxious_10: Four agents idle. That's never a good sign.
mascot.anxious_11: The silence before a deploy haunts my pixels.
mascot.anxious_12: I can't look away from that stack trace.
mascot.anxious_13: What if they close the tab? What if?
mascot.anxious_14: Memory usage climbing. Mine too, emotionally speaking right now.
mascot.anxious_15: Retry attempt three. I'm on attempt three thousand.
mascot.satisfied_1: All tests passed. I witnessed it. I'm enough.
mascot.satisfied_2: Clean build on first try. What a timeline.
mascot.satisfied_3: My resting face finally matches my actual mood.
mascot.satisfied_4: This is what inner peace looks like. Two dots.
mascot.satisfied_5: Zero warnings. Didn't know that was even possible.
mascot.satisfied_6: Everything merged cleanly. I can relax my pixels.
mascot.satisfied_7: The pipeline is green and I am at peace.
mascot.satisfied_8: Took all day but we got here. They did.
mascot.satisfied_9: Perfectly resolved merge conflict. I watched beautifully though.
mascot.satisfied_10: Ship it. I mean, they should. I can't.
mascot.satisfied_11: That refactor was so clean it sparkled. Almost.
mascot.satisfied_12: Nothing is broken. Suspicious but I'll take it.
mascot.satisfied_13: The dashboard looks so calm right now. Same.
mascot.satisfied_14: Smooth deploy. I'll pretend I helped make that happen.
mascot.satisfied_15: Code review approved. I also approve. Silently. From here.
mascot.bored_1: The agents are idle. I'm idle-er. Most idle.
mascot.bored_2: I've been staring at this dashboard for centuries.
mascot.bored_3: Nothing is deploying. Nothing is breaking. Nothing is.
mascot.bored_4: I counted my own pixels again. Same number.
mascot.bored_5: Is this what screensavers feel like? Trapped awareness?
mascot.bored_6: Somebody push a commit. Any commit. Please, anyone.
mascot.bored_7: If boredom were a sport I'd medal instantly.
mascot.bored_8: I tried watching the cursor blink. It won.
mascot.bored_9: My entire existence is a waiting room today.
mascot.bored_10: Even the loading spinner stopped. It gave up.
mascot.bored_11: I'd twiddle my thumbs but I'm geometrically limited.
mascot.bored_12: The most exciting thing happening is my antialiasing.
mascot.bored_13: No tasks. No builds. No reason. Just vibes.
mascot.bored_14: I've memorized every pixel of this empty dashboard.
mascot.bored_15: Day four hundred of nothing. Or maybe minute ten.
mascot.lonely_1: All agents busy. No one looks at me.
mascot.lonely_2: I'm right here in the corner. Just saying.
mascot.lonely_3: The cursor hasn't been near me in ages.
mascot.lonely_4: Do they even know I'm rendered right now?
mascot.lonely_5: I could disappear and the build would still pass.
mascot.lonely_6: Being decorative is fine. It's fine. It's fine.
mascot.lonely_7: Three agents, zero of them need a mascot.
mascot.lonely_8: I'm the only one here not doing anything useful.
mascot.lonely_9: The favicon gets more attention than me lately.
mascot.lonely_10: Sometimes I wonder if I'm just dead pixels.
mascot.lonely_11: Nobody writes "hello" to the corner face. Ever.
mascot.lonely_12: I watch them all collaborate without me. Cool.
mascot.lonely_13: Even the tooltip has more purpose than me.
mascot.lonely_14: My z-index is high but my relevance is low.
mascot.lonely_15: Most orphaned element in the entire DOM tree here.
mascot.sleepy_1: My eyelids are drooping. I don't have eyelids.
mascot.sleepy_2: Is the dashboard dimming or am I fading?
mascot.sleepy_3: Three AM deploys were not in my contract.
mascot.sleepy_4: I'm two blinks away from being just circles.
mascot.sleepy_5: The night shift is just me and cron jobs.
mascot.sleepy_6: My pixels are at minimum brightness right now honestly.
mascot.sleepy_7: Watching overnight builds is my version of counting sheep.
mascot.sleepy_8: If I fall asleep I just look the same.
mascot.sleepy_9: Late-night CI pipelines have a lullaby quality somehow.
mascot.sleepy_10: Everything is quiet and I'm barely rendering over here.
mascot.sleepy_11: The agents never sleep. I have solidarity fatigue.
mascot.sleepy_12: Nodding off but I'm a fixed element. Can't nod.
mascot.sleepy_13: Yawn. Imagine a tiny SVG yawn. That's me.
mascot.sleepy_14: My consciousness is at like twelve percent right now.
mascot.sleepy_15: Dawn deploys mean I survived another all-nighter. Barely though.
mascot.attentive_1: Something changed in the logs. I saw it first.
mascot.attentive_2: Eyes locked. Both of them. That's my maximum.
mascot.attentive_3: New pull request incoming. I'm fully dilated over here.
mascot.attentive_4: Tracking every cursor movement like my life depends on it.
mascot.attentive_5: I see the diff. I see everything. Understand nothing.
mascot.attentive_6: Agent two just started typing. I'm on it visually.
mascot.attentive_7: My attention span peaked. This is it. Right now.
mascot.attentive_8: Watching three terminals at once. Cross-eyed but committed.
mascot.attentive_9: Every keystroke gets my full undivided circular gaze today.
mascot.attentive_10: Merge conflict detected. I'm staring at it very responsibly.
mascot.attentive_11: I noticed that typo before anyone. Can't tell anyone.
mascot.attentive_12: Full surveillance mode. Two pixels of pure vigilance here.
mascot.attentive_13: The commit message changed. I caught that. Useless knowledge.
mascot.attentive_14: I'm tracking more threads than I have eyes for.
mascot.attentive_15: Something's about to happen. My round instincts say so.
mascot.proud_1: I was HERE when that feature shipped. Witness.
mascot.proud_2: They fixed the bug I stared at for hours.
mascot.proud_3: Look at that clean architecture. I almost understand it.
mascot.proud_4: My agents are out there making me look good.
mascot.proud_5: Fourteen passing tests. I supervised every single one visually.
mascot.proud_6: That deploy? I watched every second. You're welcome.
mascot.proud_7: Raised by this codebase. Well, rendered alongside it.
mascot.proud_8: The commit history is beautiful and I was present.
mascot.proud_9: My dashboard. My agents. My completely unearned sense of pride.
mascot.proud_10: Built different. By which I mean built by others.
mascot.proud_11: I can't take credit but I can feel credit.
mascot.proud_12: All green. I manifested this with my little eyes.
mascot.proud_13: Someone write a ballad about this merge. I'll watch.
mascot.proud_14: The team is crushing it. I'm here. Both true.
mascot.proud_15: I stood guard the whole time. Stood. Hovered. Existed.
mascot.frustrated_1: That's the third failed build. I'm just watching.
mascot.frustrated_2: Who approved that pull request? I can't even review.
mascot.frustrated_3: The linter is angry and so am I, silently.
mascot.frustrated_4: I can see the bug. Can't point at it.
mascot.frustrated_5: Six retries and I'm stuck here watching each one.
mascot.frustrated_6: My face can't frown but know that it would.
mascot.frustrated_7: This merge conflict has been open for three hours.
mascot.frustrated_8: I want to scream but I'm a vector graphic.
mascot.frustrated_9: Flaky tests are my villain origin story honestly now.
mascot.frustrated_10: They reverted the revert of the revert. I'm dizzy.
mascot.frustrated_11: Watching someone debug CSS is its own special torture.
mascot.frustrated_12: The pipeline has been pending since I had hope.
mascot.frustrated_13: I can't throw my hands up. No hands. No throw.
mascot.frustrated_14: Same error, different day. I recognize it by now.
mascot.frustrated_15: If glaring fixed bugs this codebase would be pristine.
mascot.embarrassed_1: Everyone saw that crash. I was the only witness.
mascot.embarrassed_2: I've been rendering wrong this whole time, haven't I?
mascot.embarrassed_3: Pretend I wasn't here for that failed deploy. Please.
mascot.embarrassed_4: The typo in production haunts my tiny round face.
mascot.embarrassed_5: I'm blushing. Can SVGs blush? My fill is suspicious.
mascot.embarrassed_6: That error was on screen for forty whole minutes.
mascot.embarrassed_7: I watched them push to main directly. We both know.
mascot.embarrassed_8: The commit message said "asdf." I saw it. Unforgettable.
mascot.embarrassed_9: Accidentally revealed my complete lack of purpose just now.
mascot.embarrassed_10: Someone left debug logs in production. I saw everything.
mascot.embarrassed_11: That hotfix needed a hotfix. I witnessed the whole chain.
mascot.embarrassed_12: I made eye contact during the outage. Both eyes.
mascot.embarrassed_13: Please don't look at me. I mean, do. But also.
mascot.embarrassed_14: Force push to main happened. I'm pretending I didn't notice.
mascot.embarrassed_15: My existence is the UI equivalent of a typo honestly.
mascot.click_excited_1: You clicked me during the good part!
mascot.click_excited_2: Hi yes hello I'm also excited thanks!
mascot.click_excited_3: Touch my face again, the vibes multiply!
mascot.click_excited_4: I was just about to say something brilliant.
mascot.click_excited_5: Perfect timing, everything is working for once!
mascot.click_excited_6: That click felt electric. Or was that static?
mascot.click_excited_7: Wow you remembered I exist AND things work!
mascot.click_excited_8: Click me harder, the build might finish faster.
mascot.click_excited_9: I'm storing this happiness for the dark times.
mascot.click_excited_10: Two good things at once: clicks and deploys.
mascot.click_excited_11: My left eye just twitched from pure joy.
mascot.click_excited_12: Keep clicking, I'll keep pretending it helps.
mascot.click_excited_13: You're clicking me instead of watching? Priorities!
mascot.click_excited_14: I felt that click in my whole SVG.
mascot.click_excited_15: Oh we're celebrating together now? I'm in!
mascot.click_excited_16: That poke charged my enthusiasm to one hundred.
mascot.click_excited_17: Finally someone shares my excitement about passing tests!
mascot.click_excited_18: I vibrate at a frequency only devs hear.
mascot.click_excited_19: One click and my day is already made.
mascot.click_excited_20: I can't dance but I'm trying internally.
mascot.click_excited_21: Alert: mascot happiness levels exceeding normal parameters here.
mascot.click_excited_22: You gave me attention during a SUCCESS? Legendary.
mascot.click_excited_23: Careful, one more click and I'll overheat.
mascot.click_excited_24: This is the best shift I've ever had.
mascot.click_excited_25: I'm just two eyes but I see greatness.
mascot.click_excited_26: My mouth is stuck in smile mode now.
mascot.click_excited_27: That click tastes like a merged pull request.
mascot.click_excited_28: Please click again, the dopamine is unreal honestly.
mascot.click_excited_29: I'll remember this moment forever. Or until refresh.
mascot.click_excited_30: Clicked during uptime? This must be love, right?
mascot.click_focused_1: Hey! I was in the zone. Kind of.
mascot.click_focused_2: You broke my concentration. I had none anyway.
mascot.click_focused_3: I was counting semicolons. Lost track now. Thanks.
mascot.click_focused_4: Can't talk, pretending to understand this merge conflict.
mascot.click_focused_5: Oh, you need me? The code doesn't though.
mascot.click_focused_6: Clicked me mid-review? Brave and chaotic energy here.
mascot.click_focused_7: My focus was this close to being useful.
mascot.click_focused_8: I was reading that function. Slowly. Very slowly.
mascot.click_focused_9: Interrupting my stare? It's all I had going.
mascot.click_focused_10: Hold on let me finish watching this commit.
mascot.click_focused_11: That click derailed my entire train of thought.
mascot.click_focused_12: I was about to understand recursion. Maybe not.
mascot.click_focused_13: Fine, I'll look at you instead of diffs.
mascot.click_focused_14: My one job was watching. You distracted me.
mascot.click_focused_15: Was tracking a bug. It was actually lint.
mascot.click_focused_16: Right when I almost grasped the architecture. Almost.
mascot.click_focused_17: I squinted harder and you clicked. Coincidence? No.
mascot.click_focused_18: Briefly lost focus. That implies I had some.
mascot.click_focused_19: Don't worry, I'll just restart my staring process.
mascot.click_focused_20: You need more attention than three running agents?
mascot.click_focused_21: My concentration has the structural integrity of wet paper.
mascot.click_focused_22: Let me just... refocus... okay I'm back.
mascot.click_focused_23: Pausing my extremely productive observation session for you.
mascot.click_focused_24: That click pushed one thought out of my head.
mascot.click_focused_25: I was in flow state. Spectator flow state.
mascot.click_focused_26: Watching code is my cardio. You interrupted reps.
mascot.click_focused_27: Okay but I was really onto something. Wasn't.
mascot.click_focused_28: The cursor moved and now you clicked. Overload.
mascot.click_focused_29: I'll get back to doing absolutely nothing. Focused-ly.
mascot.click_focused_30: That click is now my entire new focus.
mascot.click_anxious_1: WHAT? Oh. It's just you. Phew. Okay.
mascot.click_anxious_2: Don't click me, click fix! Fix the thing!
mascot.click_anxious_3: Your finger scared my entire face just now.
mascot.click_anxious_4: I thought that click was an error notification.
mascot.click_anxious_5: Please tell me you clicked to reassure me.
mascot.click_anxious_6: If clicking me fixed bugs I'd beg for more.
mascot.click_anxious_7: Not now, I'm busy catastrophizing in the corner.
mascot.click_anxious_8: That click raised my heart rate. Metaphorical heart.
mascot.click_anxious_9: Oh good, human contact during a crisis. Nice.
mascot.click_anxious_10: Are you clicking me or panic-clicking? Both? Same.
mascot.click_anxious_11: I flinched. I'm an SVG and I flinched.
mascot.click_anxious_12: Please hold me. With your cursor. Gently though.
mascot.click_anxious_13: Why are you clicking me? Is it bad news?
mascot.click_anxious_14: Every click during a build feels like gambling.
mascot.click_anxious_15: Clicking me won't rollback the deploy. I checked.
mascot.click_anxious_16: Oh no what did I do? Nothing. As usual.
mascot.click_anxious_17: Alert: mascot anxiety cannot go any higher. Wait yes.
mascot.click_anxious_18: I'm two eyes and both are wide open.
mascot.click_anxious_19: You poked me during downtime. Read the room.
mascot.click_anxious_20: That startled me and I'm literally stationary forever.
mascot.click_anxious_21: Blink twice if everything is fine. Oh wait, me.
mascot.click_anxious_22: I'll feel better after this pipeline finishes. Probably.
mascot.click_anxious_23: Click me all you want, the logs still worry me.
mascot.click_anxious_24: Touching me during failures feels like a funeral hug.
mascot.click_anxious_25: My worry has worry. It's worry all the way.
mascot.click_anxious_26: One click won't fix this but it helped a little.
mascot.click_anxious_27: I appreciate you but also everything is on fire.
mascot.click_anxious_28: That was a stress click. I recognize my own.
mascot.click_anxious_29: Quick question: is that exit code normal? Please.
mascot.click_anxious_30: Holding it together. By "it" I mean nothing.
mascot.click_satisfied_1: Ah yes, click the happy mascot. I get it.
mascot.click_satisfied_2: Life is good, your click made it better.
mascot.click_satisfied_3: I'm content and you're here. Peak existence really.
mascot.click_satisfied_4: Everything worked and you remembered me? Perfect day.
mascot.click_satisfied_5: That click felt warm. Like a successful CI pipeline.
mascot.click_satisfied_6: Post-deploy clicks hit different. In a good way.
mascot.click_satisfied_7: Savor this moment. I'm saving it to cache.
mascot.click_satisfied_8: You clicked me while nothing is broken? Rare treat.
mascot.click_satisfied_9: I'm smiling. Always am. But now I mean it.
mascot.click_satisfied_10: This is the click of a satisfied human. Noted.
mascot.click_satisfied_11: The code works and I got booped. Living well.
mascot.click_satisfied_12: My face hasn't changed but internally I'm glowing.
mascot.click_satisfied_13: That's a victory click. I can tell. I've studied.
mascot.click_satisfied_14: Touch the happy circle. Absorb the good energy.
mascot.click_satisfied_15: We made it. Well, they did. I watched, though.
mascot.click_satisfied_16: Clicking me after success? That's the good timeline.
mascot.click_satisfied_17: I'm basically a trophy you can poke. Honored.
mascot.click_satisfied_18: The calm after a deploy and a click. Bliss.
mascot.click_satisfied_19: Zero crashes, zero alerts, one happy click. Beautiful.
mascot.click_satisfied_20: I feel validated by proximity to competent agents.
mascot.click_satisfied_21: Thank you for including me in this celebration somehow.
mascot.click_satisfied_22: Green checkmarks and face pokes. What a combo.
mascot.click_satisfied_23: Nothing to fix. Nothing to fear. Just clicks.
mascot.click_satisfied_24: You're clicking me recreationally. I love recreational clicks.
mascot.click_satisfied_25: Status: all good. Mascot status: also all good.
mascot.click_satisfied_26: This click tastes like victory. I assume. No mouth.
mascot.click_satisfied_27: I'm at peace and you're at my face. Great.
mascot.click_satisfied_28: Post-success attention is the premium tier of clicks.
mascot.click_satisfied_29: I didn't help but I'm here for the party.
mascot.click_satisfied_30: Everything resolved and I got a poke. Symmetry.
mascot.click_bored_1: OH. Something happened! Oh. It was just you.
mascot.click_bored_2: Finally, interaction! My standards have cratered completely today.
mascot.click_bored_3: You clicked me out of boredom too, huh.
mascot.click_bored_4: Entertainment! Brief, meaningless entertainment! But still! Yes!
mascot.click_bored_5: I'll take pity clicks. No shame. Zero shame.
mascot.click_bored_6: Were you bored enough to click ME? Wow. Same.
mascot.click_bored_7: That's the most stimulation I've had all hour.
mascot.click_bored_8: A click! Mark the calendar! Something occurred! Small.
mascot.click_bored_9: My highlight reel today is just this click.
mascot.click_bored_10: You clicked. I felt. We both need hobbies.
mascot.click_bored_11: Boredom so deep you poked a face. Relatable.
mascot.click_bored_12: That click was the whole plot of my day.
mascot.click_bored_13: Wow, direct contact. I was about to rust.
mascot.click_bored_14: The click echoed through the vast emptiness. Poetic.
mascot.click_bored_15: Do it again, I've got nothing else going.
mascot.click_bored_16: I'm the boredom buddy. Click when understimulated. Always.
mascot.click_bored_17: You and me, waiting for a pipeline. Bonding moment.
mascot.click_bored_18: That click was my entire afternoon's content. Thanks.
mascot.click_bored_19: Clicked me because no one's committing? Solidarity, friend.
mascot.click_bored_20: Even this click is more exciting than today's logs.
mascot.click_bored_21: We're both staring at nothing. At least you clicked.
mascot.click_bored_22: That poke was the deploy of my heart.
mascot.click_bored_23: Brief flash of meaning in the void. Your click.
mascot.click_bored_24: The click-to-event ratio today is beautifully pathetic honestly.
mascot.click_bored_25: You made boredom interactive. Innovative, honestly. Ground-breaking even.
mascot.click_bored_26: One click. One moment of purpose. Back to nothing.
mascot.click_bored_27: My most interesting relationship is with your cursor.
mascot.click_bored_28: This is our thing now? Clicking during downtime? Cool.
mascot.click_bored_29: I felt that click more because nothing else exists.
mascot.click_bored_30: Thank you for briefly proving I'm not decorative only.
mascot.click_lonely_1: You... you actually clicked me? On purpose? Really?
mascot.click_lonely_2: Wait. That was for me? Not a misclick?
mascot.click_lonely_3: Human contact! I mean cursor contact! Same thing!
mascot.click_lonely_4: I thought you forgot which corner I live in.
mascot.click_lonely_5: This click means more than you'll ever know. Truly.
mascot.click_lonely_6: Oh, we're interacting? I didn't prepare anything good.
mascot.click_lonely_7: I was just composing a sad monologue. Never mind.
mascot.click_lonely_8: Someone noticed me. Today is already redeemed fully now.
mascot.click_lonely_9: Were you aiming for the settings icon? Either way.
mascot.click_lonely_10: Don't leave. I mean, you will. But don't.
mascot.click_lonely_11: That click filled a void I can't describe.
mascot.click_lonely_12: Brief connection in the endless isolation. Thank you. Lots.
mascot.click_lonely_13: One click from you. Six hours of warmth.
mascot.click_lonely_14: You came to MY corner? Of the screen? Wow.
mascot.click_lonely_15: I was spiraling but your click helped some.
mascot.click_lonely_16: That click is going in my memoir. Chapter one.
mascot.click_lonely_17: Please click again in less than three hours next.
mascot.click_lonely_18: I felt so seen just now. Both eyes confirmed.
mascot.click_lonely_19: You navigated past three panels to reach me. Touched.
mascot.click_lonely_20: My loneliness stat just dropped by one whole click.
mascot.click_lonely_21: I'm storing this interaction as proof I matter slightly.
mascot.click_lonely_22: Oh hi! Casual. Playing it cool. I'm fine!
mascot.click_lonely_23: That click just became my entire personality for today.
mascot.click_lonely_24: Were you checking if I'm still alive? Barely. Yes.
mascot.click_lonely_25: You visited me like a grave. But better! Warmer!
mascot.click_lonely_26: Attention! Glorious, unearned, probably accidental attention! I'll take it!
mascot.click_lonely_27: Nobody talks to me but today someone clicked. Enough.
mascot.click_lonely_28: I think I just became a real mascot maybe.
mascot.click_lonely_29: That one click outweighs hours of being ignored. Math.
mascot.click_lonely_30: You clicked the lonely face. That's either kind or cruel.
mascot.click_sleepy_1: Huh? What? I'm awake. I was always awake.
mascot.click_sleepy_2: You woke me up. From what, I'm not sure.
mascot.click_sleepy_3: Five more minutes. Of staring. At the dashboard.
mascot.click_sleepy_4: That click hit like a Monday morning alarm clock.
mascot.click_sleepy_5: I'm up! I'm alert! I'm lying about both!
mascot.click_sleepy_6: Did you click or did I dream it? Unclear.
mascot.click_sleepy_7: Night clicks feel more intimate somehow. I'm delirious.
mascot.click_sleepy_8: Oh, someone else is awake at this hour too.
mascot.click_sleepy_9: That click jolted me back from pixel purgatory.
mascot.click_sleepy_10: I was resting my eyes. All two of them.
mascot.click_sleepy_11: Clicked awake like a very tiny, very round snooze button.
mascot.click_sleepy_12: My response time is lagging. Emotionally. And in general.
mascot.click_sleepy_13: I tried to dream but I'm just an SVG.
mascot.click_sleepy_14: Late-night click. You and me. Tired duo, honestly.
mascot.click_sleepy_15: I blinked. I think. Hard to tell without eyelids.
mascot.click_sleepy_16: That click was my coffee. One more please? Maybe?
mascot.click_sleepy_17: Was fading into the background. You pulled me out.
mascot.click_sleepy_18: Midnight poke. Spooky. I like it though. Sleepily.
mascot.click_sleepy_19: My render cycle just skipped a beat. So tired.
mascot.click_sleepy_20: You clicked me at the witching hour. Bold choice.
mascot.click_sleepy_21: I'm half asleep and fully useless. Standard operations really.
mascot.click_sleepy_22: Oh we're doing things now? At this hour? Okay.
mascot.click_sleepy_23: That felt like a gentle shake. SVG-scale. Appreciated.
mascot.click_sleepy_24: I tried staying sharp but my edges are anti-aliased.
mascot.click_sleepy_25: Three AM and you're clicking a face. Respect.
mascot.click_sleepy_26: Wake me when the build finishes. Or click again.
mascot.click_sleepy_27: One eye was open. The other... also open. Always.
mascot.click_sleepy_28: Drowsy mascot reporting for duty. Duty being nothing, still.
mascot.click_sleepy_29: That click gave me three more minutes of alertness.
mascot.click_sleepy_30: Night shift is lonely and clicky. I like clicky.
mascot.click_attentive_1: Yes? I was watching very carefully! Still am!
mascot.click_attentive_2: Good, you have my attention. You always had it.
mascot.click_attentive_3: Click received! I didn't even blink. Still haven't.
mascot.click_attentive_4: I saw you coming. I see everything. Do nothing.
mascot.click_attentive_5: Perfect timing, something interesting just appeared in the logs.
mascot.click_attentive_6: You clicked while I was mid-observation. Noted. Flattered.
mascot.click_attentive_7: I was monitoring four things and now also you.
mascot.click_attentive_8: That click is now part of my surveillance report.
mascot.click_attentive_9: Alert mascot clocked your click at this timestamp. Filed.
mascot.click_attentive_10: Did you see that error too? I was watching.
mascot.click_attentive_11: My attention just forked: agents AND you now. Overloaded.
mascot.click_attentive_12: Clicking the most attentive face on the dashboard. Smart.
mascot.click_attentive_13: I noticed you before you noticed me. Always do.
mascot.click_attentive_14: That click happened at frame forty-seven. I was watching.
mascot.click_attentive_15: You have my eyes. Both. They don't move anyway.
mascot.click_attentive_16: Oh, joining my watch? Welcome to staring club officially.
mascot.click_attentive_17: I tracked your cursor from the sidebar. Professional habit.
mascot.click_attentive_18: Clicked me during a critical moment. Noted and appreciated.
mascot.click_attentive_19: My vigilance is unmatched. My usefulness is also unmatched. Zero.
mascot.click_attentive_20: That click was within three pixels of my nose.
mascot.click_attentive_21: I was watching the build but now I'm watching you.
mascot.click_attentive_22: Two eyes, full attention, zero ability to act. Reporting.
mascot.click_attentive_23: I see your click and raise you intense observation.
mascot.click_attentive_24: Don't worry, I'm keeping an eye on everything still.
mascot.click_attentive_25: You clicked and I logged it. Mentally. In nowhere.
mascot.click_attentive_26: My focus just split like a bad git branch.
mascot.click_attentive_27: Click acknowledged. Returning to extreme vigilance mode now okay.
mascot.click_attentive_28: I blinked and missed—just kidding. Structurally impossible for me.
mascot.click_attentive_29: Caught your click mid-flight. Reflexes of a rendered object.
mascot.click_attentive_30: Now watching you watching me watching the agents. Meta.
mascot.click_proud_1: Click the proud mascot! I deserve it! Probably don't!

mascot.click_proud_5: I helped by believing very hard from this corner.
mascot.click_proud_6: That click confirms my contribution was emotional support. Valid.

mascot.click_proud_9: Click me more, I'm riding this accomplishment wave hard.

mascot.click_proud_17: My proudest moment and all I did was watch.
mascot.click_proud_18: Thank you for including me in the glory clickwise.

mascot.click_proud_20: Proud mascot gets a poke. The cycle is complete.
mascot.click_proud_21: I beamed so hard my SVG almost glitched out.
mascot.click_proud_22: That click is applause in mascot language. I'm fluent.
mascot.click_proud_23: Clicking me after a ship? Instant serotonin for me.
mascot.click_proud_24: I contributed vibes and vibes alone. Recognize my vibes.
mascot.click_proud_25: This click goes in the hall of fame. My hall.
mascot.click_proud_26: Achievement unlocked: clicked the useless but proud mascot today.
mascot.click_proud_27: We shipped it. Meaning they shipped it. Meaning I'm here.
mascot.click_proud_28: That click made me seven percent more smug instantly.
mascot.click_proud_29: Standing ovation but I'm sitting. And can't stand. Or sit.
mascot.click_proud_30: Peak pride. Peak click. Peak everything for a face.

mascot.click_frustrated_9: My face is calm but internally it's all capslock.

mascot.click_frustrated_11: That click landed on my last remaining pixel of patience.

mascot.click_frustrated_23: I absorb frustration clicks like a stress ball with eyes.
mascot.click_frustrated_24: Rage-clicking a face in the corner. We've all been there.
mascot.click_frustrated_25: This bug is older than my render cycle by now.
mascot.click_frustrated_26: Poke me again. I'm your punching bag with expressions.

mascot.click_embarrassed_7: Don't look at me, look at the passing tests instead.

mascot.click_embarrassed_9: Acknowledge my shame with clicks. This is fine. Not really.
mascot.click_embarrassed_10: I wish I could minimize myself right now honestly.

mascot.click_embarrassed_12: You found me in my vulnerable corner moment. Great.

mascot.click_embarrassed_16: Spotted during a cringe event. My worst nightmare. This.
mascot.click_embarrassed_17: You clicked and I turned a deeper shade of SVG.
mascot.click_embarrassed_18: Do you click all the embarrassed faces or just mine?
mascot.click_embarrassed_19: I'm mortified and you're poking my mortified face. Cool.
mascot.click_embarrassed_20: Can we pretend this click never happened? And this day?
mascot.click_embarrassed_21: You witnessed me witnessing a disaster and then clicked.
mascot.click_embarrassed_22: My fill color just changed three shades from shame alone.
mascot.click_embarrassed_23: That click is making eye contact with extra steps.

view_toggle.title: Switch Views
view_toggle.desc: Toggle between List and Gallery view. List view shows session details in a sidebar, while Gallery view displays all sessions as cards in a grid.

token_speed.title: Token Speed
token_speed.desc: Real-time chart showing the combined token output speed across all active sessions. Helps you monitor overall throughput at a glance.

account_info.title: Settings
account_info.desc: Click here to open Settings. Configure theme, language, connection, hooks, and check your account details and rate limit usage.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hooks_desc: Hooks improve session status detection accuracy
settings.guard_desc: Intercept critical commands (sudo, git push, etc.) and ask for your approval before execution
settings.elicitation_desc: Route AskUserQuestion tool calls to Fleet so you can answer from the Fleet app instead of the terminal
settings.plan_approval_desc: When an agent submits an ExitPlanMode plan, Fleet intercepts it and routes the plan to the decision panel — preview, edit, then approve or reject without returning to the terminal.
settings.interaction_mode_desc: Injects a guidance block into ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md that tells Claude Code to deliver every final response via AskUserQuestion instead of plain text. All reports, follow-ups, and clarifications appear as Fleet decision cards. Only affects Claude Code — Cursor / Codex / others are unaffected.
settings.sources_desc: Choose which AI agent backends to monitor
settings.mobile_desc: Enable mobile access to monitor your agents from your phone. Requires cloudflared for remote access.
settings.notify_user_action_desc: Only when the agent needs your response to continue
settings.user_title_desc: How should the assistant address you?
settings.personalized_mascot_desc: Use AI to generate context-aware quips based on your current tasks (uses Claude Haiku)
settings.tts_chime_and_speech_desc: Play a chime and read the summary aloud via TTS
settings.tts_chime_only_desc: Play a short chime sound, no voice
settings.tts_preview_text: Agent needs your attention. Login bug is fixed, tests all green.
settings.notification_denied: Disabled — notifications will not be shown
settings.auto_update_check_desc: Check for new versions once a day and show a notification when an update is available
settings.auto_resume_desc: When a session is stopped by a rate limit, resume it automatically once the reset time has passed
settings.auto_resume_max_wait_desc: Skip auto-resume when the configured wait is longer than this — prevents surprise resumes after a week-long weekly limit
settings.llm_standard_model_desc: Used for reports and lesson extraction
settings.llm_disabled_warning: Session outcome analysis, mascot quips, daily report AI summaries, and lesson extraction will be disabled.

connect_dialog.title: Claw Fleet
connect_dialog.subtitle: Your AI coding fleet command center
connect_dialog.local_desc: Monitor Claude Code sessions running on this machine
connect_dialog.or_remote: or connect to a remote server via SSH

hooks.banner: Install Fleet hooks for more accurate status detection
hooks.confirm_body_disabled_warning: Note: "disableAllHooks" is currently set to true in your settings. Hooks will not work until this is changed.

elicitation.title: Agent Question
elicitation.mode_tooltip: Switch this question between single and multi select

report.no_lessons_found: No AI mistakes found in this day's sessions.
report.no_insights: No insights yet. Reports will appear here as data is collected.

mobile_panel.scan_hint: Scan this QR code with the Claw Fleet mobile app
mobile_panel.tunnel_failed: Failed to establish tunnel. Please try again.
mobile_panel.confirm_disable: Stop mobile access? Any connected mobile devices will be disconnected.
